discovery.name: EDITABLE_INDEPENDENT_VALUE_SET
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT vs.flex_value_set_name AS VSNAME, vs.flex_value_set_id AS VSID, vs.maximum_size AS MAXSZ FROM fnd_flex_value_sets vs JOIN fnd_flex_values fv ON fv.flex_value_set_id = vs.flex_value_set_id WHERE vs.validation_type = 'I' AND NVL(vs.protected_flag,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(vs.security_enabled_flag,'N') = 'N' AND vs.format_type = 'C' AND vs.maximum_size BETWEEN 20 AND 40 AND vs.flex_value_set_name NOT LIKE '%$%' AND vs.created_by <> 'SEED_DATA_FROM_APPLICATION' GROUP BY vs.flex_value_set_name, vs.flex_value_set_id, vs.maximum_size HAVING COUNT(fv.flex_value) BETWEEN 2 AND 200 ORDER BY COUNT(fv.flex_value), vs.flex_value_set_id ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

payload.Description: DMT gold bad value ${PREFIX} exceeds MaximumSize

base_read.sql: SELECT fv.flex_value AS FLEX_VALUE, MAX(fv.flex_value_id) AS FLEX_VALUE_ID FROM fnd_flex_values fv JOIN fnd_flex_value_sets vs ON vs.flex_value_set_id = fv.flex_value_set_id WHERE vs.flex_value_set_id = ${VS_ID} AND fv.flex_value LIKE 'G${PREFIX}%' GROUP BY fv.flex_value

bad_read.sql: SELECT fv.flex_value AS FLEX_VALUE, MAX(fv.flex_value_id) AS FLEX_VALUE_ID FROM fnd_flex_values fv JOIN fnd_flex_value_sets vs ON vs.flex_value_set_id = fv.flex_value_set_id WHERE vs.flex_value_set_id = ${VS_ID} AND fv.flex_value LIKE 'B${PREFIX}%' GROUP BY fv.flex_value

verify.bad_absence_note: REST POST to valueSets/${VS_CODE}/child/values rejected with HTTP 400 'The value ... is too long. (FND-2825)' at load time (Value exceeds the value set MaximumSize); the error detail is captured in the load result. A rejected value POST is atomic and creates no FND_FLEX_VALUES row, so rejection is proven by ABSENCE from base table FND_FLEX_VALUES for the discovered value set while the two good values from the same run reached FND_FLEX_VALUES with real FLEX_VALUE_IDs.
